_meta.title: Report family BUILD (M1 component wave -> catalog wave -> M2 teaching wave) — the execution plan the report-family SPEC/LLD are authored against
_meta.author: planner (design seat)
_meta.grounding: PRD report-family.prd.md (PRD-G1/G2/G3) · ADR-0111 (accepted; clauses 1-8 + forks F1-F4 as recommended) · the intake decomp report-family-intake.decomp.json (M0 records only — this manifest adds the build plane it deliberately did not cover; the chart-family-build.decomp.json precedent) · fleet gates verified against the tree: file-set.test.ts, family-coherence.test.ts, descriptor/site-coverage.test.ts (per-tier page law + the display-tier membership list), catalog/default/index.test.ts (SPEC-N2 fleet-derived gate), a2ui/tools/agent/feed-catalog.ts + feed-catalog.test.ts (the ADR-0097 TOTAL-partition gate — goes red the moment the three rows land without dispositions)
_meta.note: Both planes derived independently: OUTSIDE-IN from the wave/slice structure the fleet's build discipline imposes (pure model -> control folder -> ONE serial integration writer -> site pages -> catalog rows + dispositions -> teaching), sliced for fan-out (one writer per folder; every shared/barrel edit in the single serial slice). INSIDE-OUT from what the three controls must DO (resolve typed cells deterministically incl. value-degenerate ones, stamp a real native table and own its UA reset, keep the overflow scroll across bound rows updates, scroll wide tables inside the component never the page, render the stat tile with direction-as-text and no heading stamp, render the compact badge with per-intent component-drawn glyphs, survive WHCM/RTL cross-engine, stay catalog-reachable with feed dispositions recorded, re-teach the four-way guidance) — enumerated from ADR-0111's clauses + the standing laws (ADR-0102, ADR-0057, ADR-0041 compact realm, geometry.md Display row, geometry-sizing-spec §4.7/§4.8, test-the-whole-shape), not read off the node tree.

nodes.label: table pure-model module (controls/table/table-model.ts, DOM-free: clean/resolve/format + safe JSON codecs)
nodes.accept: table-model.test.ts (DOM-free unit) covers every SPEC-R3 value-degeneracy row (missing key / null / non-finite number / type-mismatched cell / non-record row / invalid column / empty columns / empty rows / duplicate keys) against the frozen cleanColumns/cleanRows/resolveCell signatures, plus codec round-trips incl. malformed JSON and from(null)=[]; `npm test` green on the file

nodes.label: ui-table control folder (table.ts/.css/.md + jsdom & browser tests — the native-<table> stamp, the scroll-preserving re-render, the overflow container)
nodes.accept: file-set gate passes for controls/table/; jsdom probe asserts real <caption>/<thead th scope=col>/<tbody> structure from a columns+rows payload with number cells Intl-formatted and each degenerate cell rendering per the SPEC-R3 table, no throw; browser legs (Chromium+WebKit) assert (1) a wide table scrolls inside [data-part=scroll] while document.scrollingElement does not move, (2) a bound rows update preserves the container's scrollLeft/scrollTop and the scroll-container/table/thead node identities, (3) RTL flips number end-alignment (measured positions), (4) whole-shape: a bare populated ui-table in a flex row paints >= its token floor

nodes.label: ui-stat control folder (stat.ts/.css/.md + stat-model.ts + jsdom & browser tests — label/value/delta/caption tile, no heading stamp)
nodes.accept: file-set gate passes for controls/stat/; jsdom probe asserts NO h1-h6 element anywhere in the component-built DOM, value Intl-formatted (number) or passed through (string) with non-finite -> the placeholder, and the delta's accessible text containing the direction word (up/down/unchanged) with the glyph node aria-hidden; browser legs (both engines) assert a bare ui-stat in a flex row paints non-collapsed >= its token floor and the delta glyph paints in a system ink under forced-colors

nodes.label: ui-badge control folder (badge.ts/.css/.md + jsdom & browser tests — compact-realm token, bindable intent enum, per-intent component-drawn glyph)
nodes.accept: file-set gate passes for controls/badge/; jsdom probe asserts intent reflects to [intent] with unknown/bound-garbage values snapping to neutral, label as real text, and the glyph node aria-hidden and present; browser legs (both engines) assert every non-neutral intent renders a visibly distinct clip-path glyph (computed clip-path differs pairwise — the ADR-0057 predicate: two intents never differ by color alone), pill radius = box/2, forced-colors keeps box border + glyph in system inks, and an empty-label badge paints >= its box floor

nodes.label: serial integration slice (controls/index.ts barrel · component-styles.css imports · site-coverage display-tier membership edit · package.json exports · size report)
nodes.accept: `npm run check && npm test` green repo-wide (family-coherence C1/C3 prove barrel export + styles import for all three; site-coverage display-tier membership list updated to include badge/stat/table; per-control package.json exports entries present per the ADR-0080 three-way gate); `npm run size` run by hand and reported, with the ADR-0107-Amendment 26 KB family-ceiling re-base recorded as its own note if exceeded (per-control <= ~2 KB gz marginal cap the real gate)

nodes.label: site doc pages (site/table-doc.html + site/stat-doc.html + site/badge-doc.html + nav/toc rows)
nodes.accept: site-coverage per-tier page gate green for all three display-tier descriptors ({name}-doc.html present); site toc/nav drift gates green; the three pages render the live controls in the built site with degenerate-input strips as visual fixtures

nodes.label: M1 catalog wave (same wave as the descriptors — SPEC-N2; the partition gate red until n2b)
default-catalog rows + factories (catalog.json Table/Stat/Badge · factories.ts · gate tests)
nodes.accept: catalog.json declares Table+Stat+Badge per the report-family SPEC row contract (Stat.value as the ["string","number"] union the conformance validator's types.some already accepts; Badge.intent a bindable enum); all three factory-bound (display-only, no value mark, no children); factories.test.ts + catalog/default/index.test.ts fleet-derived gate green with EXCLUSION_ALLOWLIST residue none; the ADR-0111 cl.2 example payloads validate 0 CATALOG errors through validateA2ui

nodes.label: feed-partition dispositions (feed-catalog.ts: Badge IN · Stat OUT + reason · Table OUT + reason)
nodes.accept: FEED_SURFACE_TYPES gains Badge; FEED_EXCLUDED gains Stat and Table each with the ADR-0111 cl.7 recorded reason; feed-catalog.test.ts partition gate green (union = catalog type set exactly, disjoint); ask-policy semantics otherwise unchanged

nodes.label: catalog SPEC repair (a2ui-catalog.spec.md §5.2 gains the three rows in the same change as the code rows)
nodes.accept: a2ui-catalog.spec.md §5.2 carries Table/Stat/Badge rows (cells per the report-family SPEC catalog table + landed factory facts); the catalog SPEC still passes its harness gate (harness_checks.py spec exit 0)

nodes.label: guidance re-base + exemplars (§5.2 four-way rule re-based onto Stat/Table; report-card tile -> Stat; a table-bearing exemplar joins allSeeds)
nodes.accept: the §5.2 four-way guidance reads Stat-for-latest-value · Sparkline-for-series-shape · BarChart-for-magnitudes · Table-for-row-by-row — neither hand-composed idiom remains the official answer; the report-card exemplar's hand tile is a Stat; a table-bearing exemplar exists in allSeeds; every touched seed validates 0 CATALOG errors and renders in the gallery (browser-verified)

nodes.label: corpus + derived-prompt re-validation over the widened catalog
nodes.accept: the corpus admission gate and the derived-prompt/coverage gates re-run green with the three new types in the catalog (the ADR-0087 consequence pattern); any shard/prompt drift is repaired in the same change

actions.label: resolve typed cells from columns x record-rows deterministically — missing key, null, non-finite number, type-mismatched cell, non-record row each mapped to a defined rendering, never a throw
stamp a real native <table> (caption/thead th-scope/tbody) in light DOM from the data and own the UA-default + page-cascade reset under @scope
keep the overflow container's scroll position and node identity across a bound rows update, and scroll wide tables inside the component's own container, never the page
render the metric tile — label/value/delta/caption as real token-typed text, direction announced as text with the glyph aria-hidden, no heading elements stamped, no valence coloring
render the compact status token — compact-realm box/pad/pill geometry, bindable intent hardened at the component boundary, every non-neutral intent carrying a component-drawn non-color glyph
join the fleet lifecycle: barrel export, styles import, descriptor trip-wires, per-control exports, size budget honesty
document the three controls under the site per-tier page law
make the three types catalog-reachable and validator-clean the same wave the descriptors land (SPEC-N2)
record the TOTAL-partition feed dispositions (Badge IN, Stat OUT, Table OUT) so the ADR-0097 gate goes green, not waved off
keep the owning catalog SPEC true — §5.2 rows land in the same change as the code rows
stop teaching the workaround: re-base the four-way guidance and upgrade/add the exemplars that retire the hand-composed tile and List-table idioms
re-validate the teaching surfaces (corpus, derived prompt) over the widened catalog

edges.why: the element stamps exactly what the frozen model signatures resolve — thead/tbody content and every degenerate-cell rendering are table-model.ts outputs; the element cannot be coded against a guess
the serial integration slice edits the shared barrel/styles/gate files to export what the table folder ships — the folder must exist first (one-writer-per-file fan-out law)
same shared-file dependency for the stat folder — all three folders land before the ONE serial writer touches controls/index.ts and component-styles.css
same shared-file dependency for the badge folder
the doc pages mount the barrel-exported, style-imported controls; before the integration slice the site build cannot resolve them
the SPEC-N2 fleet-derived gate walks shipped, integrated descriptors (tag -> PascalCase) — the catalog rows are validated against descriptors that exist, in the same wave (ADR-0111 cl.6)

the ADR-0097 partition gate closes over the catalog's type set — the moment the three rows land the gate is red until each type carries its disposition (the partition is TOTAL; the Amendment-2 lesson)
the §5.2 rows record landed facts (factory binding, no value mark, prop cells), not intentions
the exemplars and the re-based guidance validate against the widened catalog — Table/Stat/Badge must be declared before any seed using them can pass admission
the corpus/prompt re-validation covers the new/upgraded exemplars too — it runs after the seeds land so one pass proves the whole widened surface
